Name: Snowchange - Deploy Scripts
Description:
[Snowchange](https://github.com/jamesweakley/snowchange#overview) is a Python script that applies migration scripts to [Snowflake](https://www.snowflake.com/) systems.

**Dependencies:**
This step is a PowerShell script which requires Python (and pip) to run.
For the scripts package, ensure scripts follow the [naming convention](https://github.com/jamesweakley/snowchange#script-naming) presribed by SnowChange, which uses the Flyway naming convention.

**Activities:**
* Uses pip to update itself and install `wheel` and `snowflake-connector-python`.
* If a path to Snowchange.py is not provided, retrieves the latest version of the file from Github.
* Generates a process-level environment variable, `SNOWSQL_PWD`, which Snowchange requires in order to function.

Parameters.Name: SnowChangeDeploySnowflakeScriptsPackage
Parameters.Label: Scripts Package
Parameters.HelpText: The deployment package that contains the scripts to implement.

Parameters.Name: SnowChangeDeployPath
Parameters.Label: Path to Snowchange
Parameters.HelpText: _Optional:_ Provide an absolute path to an installed copy of snowchange.py. If left blank, the latest version will be downloaded from Github.

Parameters.Name: SnowChangeDeploySnowflakeAccountName
Parameters.Label: Snowflake Account
Parameters.HelpText: This is the prefix to the Snowflake Url e.g. `contoso` and not `contoso.us-east-1.snowflake...`

Parameters.Name: SnowChangeDeploySnowflakeRegion
Parameters.Label: Snowflake Region
Parameters.HelpText: The cloud region of the Snowflake account. e.g. `us-east-1`

Parameters.Name: SnowChangeDeploySnowflakeWarehouse
Parameters.Label: Warehouse
Parameters.HelpText: The Snowflake warehouse that will receive the changes from the script.

Parameters.Name: SnowChangeDeploySnowflakeDatabaseName
Parameters.Label: Database Name
Parameters.HelpText:
_Optional:_ Database name is used to contain the metadata changes within the database. If none is provided, a default `METADATA`
 database is created at the top level.

Parameters.Name: SnowChangeDeploySnowflakeDeploymentRole
Parameters.Label: Role
Parameters.HelpText: The role used by the user to execute the scripts.

Parameters.Name: SnowChangeDeploySnowflakeDeploymentUser
Parameters.Label: Snowflake Deployment User Name
Parameters.HelpText: The username Snowchange will use to run the scripts.

Parameters.Name: SnowChangeDeploySNOWSQL_PWD
Parameters.Label: Snowflake Deployment User Password
Parameters.HelpText: The script will create a process-level environment variable SNOWSQL_PWD, which Snowchange uses for authenticating to Snowflake.
